calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Prevailing Party Attorneys' Fees By Plaintiff Against Defendant Ultiprf, Llc
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEPHEN L. PORTER OF THE WHITEHEAD & PORTER LLP, TEL. NO. 781-6070 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING- The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MEYERS LAW GROUP, P.C.'S Motion For Prevailing Party Attorneys' Fees is granted. The moving party provided a proof of service prior to the hearing. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ehg

Notice Of Amended Petition To Confirm Arb Award; Amended Petition
Off Calendar Oct-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stephen L. Porter, Esq. of Whitehead & Porter LLP, T:415.781.6070, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF MEYERS LAW GROUP, P.C.'s Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR# 11185.

Amended Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MEYERS LAW GROUP, P.C. Amended Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is off calendar. Respondent has filed for bankruptcy protection and this action is stayed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Off Calendar
